name: Student Package — 3D2N Ijen & Bromo from Bali
description: ISIC student rate for 3-day private Ijen Blue Fire + Bromo sunrise from Bali. Gilimanuk-Ketapang ferry crossing included. Same safety standards: HPWKI-registered guides, mandatory Ijen health screening (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024). ISIC Provider ID 259268. Licensed operator NIB 1102230032918.
touristType: International students with verified ISIC card

item.name: Day 1 — Bali to Bondowoso via Ferry
item.description: Pick-up from Bali. Gilimanuk-Ketapang ferry crossing to Java. Private transfer to Bondowoso. Health screening on arrival (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024).

item.name: Day 2 — Ijen Blue Fire + Transfer to Bromo
item.description: Midnight departure to Paltuding base. Guided ascent to Kawah Ijen crater rim (2,386 m). Blue Fire observation. Gas masks and trekking poles provided. Descent, breakfast, transfer west to Bromo area.

item.name: Day 3 — Bromo Sunrise + Return to Surabaya
item.description: Penanjakan viewpoint for Bromo sunrise over the Tengger caldera. Private 4WD jeep to crater base. Transfer to Surabaya for drop-off.

offers.description: ISIC student pricing per person: IDR 2,900,000 (2 pax) · IDR 2,700,000 (3) · IDR 2,500,000 (4–5) · IDR 2,300,000 (6–7) · IDR 2,100,000 (8–10) · IDR 1,900,000 (11+). Minimum 2 guests. Includes Gilimanuk-Ketapang ferry crossing. Valid ISIC card required.
